# Security Policy

See the [root SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the full policy,
reporting channels, response-time commitments, supported-versions
matrix, scope, self-hosting checklist, and regulatory-reporting
obligations under EU Regulation 2024/2847 (Cyber Resilience Act).

**Report vulnerabilities privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/datadrivenconstruction/OpenConstructionERP/security/advisories/new)
or by email to `info@datadrivenconstruction.io`.**
